textByHashes.39baa252f63175195c371fb0ef9fcb6dbbf0f5ae: Why do you want to know?
textByHashes.752aafdb2d33187a172cd6656f37213c41c29754: I don't think people would really like us talking all about their travels...
textByHashes.6001d963bca7d3fc093c321d8e95fa502d39dc32: Although, we could use a hand... Think you could do us a small favour?
textByHashes.0ffa4b1f6127537f4670448436f3ccd33065ccfb: We've been meaning to get our old sails stitched up, but haven't had a chance to get away and have it done...
textByHashes.ab08e2f194d0646c06b1b99b1dca6c12cddf4890: Hard to believe that Trader Stan had these clothes enchanted to re-stitch themselves so we can't ruin them, but the sails were too much to ask for! Some people's priorities, huh?
textByHashes.879d252fbf2adf62aeb42c03fd22cdbf476c8c72: Perfect! There's a crafting store just down the road. They should be able to fix them up.
textByHashes.fd14edd69a1ed84de70d44f9076e6f3136acb471: Then I don't know anything about a man with a case.
textByHashes.f8c99570b7d1eb7f913dd5ae90bd46d6ec75f97f: That depends. Are you ready to take us up on that favour?
textByHashes.50c0f460f386d49d36ecee6053970352428b4bb6: Oh, yeah. You're meant to be getting our sails fixed up, right?
textByHashes.03e42856e379fc495a46355321fa4e41d4976b3a: That crafting store just down the road.
textByHashes.f2163cbee9a68cd998b2bdf0ffad9fe8a05a168e: You misplaced them right here. Here you go.
textByHashes.658a741ccb0c075d6305ea2c6019664220e2388f: That's great! Always nice to hear from a happy customer!
textByHashes.0376a163ad30a5c24cde92f6abfd421b7ccb57bc: Anyway, the man with the case. Grey-haired fella, right? Yeah, he came by. Asked if he could have a go with our boat. Told him that's not really how this works.
textByHashes.0df85f2b93c43e4a2e0383173c16ee3d325b22fc: Well, we explained how it does work and he then asked us to take him to Port Sarim...
textByHashes.f1e3345988d2762db25aa8d0c068319d01d1c612: Oh, yeah. Grey-haired fella, right? Yeah, he came by. Asked if he could have a go with our boat. Told him that's now how this works.
textByHashes.70b904c59c3a40fda83724f45f3e09d77c9b5f8c: Yeah, I know the one. Came all the way from Fortis, right?
textByHashes.a570d8d7a88bf493909160b122795cc290a1fa89: Wandered up north, I think. Said something about trying to get hold of some runes.
textByHashes.ada4658adc063d101a2525dc339ea9212e5954e2: The one from Fortis? He wandered up north, I think. Said something about trying to get hold of some runes.
textByHashes.d444afb648a42d75f1585002588fa8117438dd4a: I'm one of Trader Stan's crew; we are all part of the largest fleet of trading and sailing vessels to ever sail the seven seas.
textByHashes.1d8a5995e4f2b54a0f6a4ff25f63b69299e3fc8e: If you want to get to a port in a hurry then you can charter one of our ships to take you there - if the price is right...
textByHashes.c3b9556a03a3209571dfac5340b3abc51ad62c64: We run ships from Port Phasmatys over to Port Tyras, stopping at Port Sarim, Catherby, Brimhaven, Musa Point, Port Khazard and more besides!
textByHashes.13ad0795c9cee1c04fbab5f12e65971ebca60e3f: We might dock at Mos Le'Harmless once in a while, as well, if you catch my meaning...
textByHashes.42bd525675fa742562eddca2174a093df9e9b0fa: We certainly do! We have access to items bought and sold from around the world. Would you like to take a look? Or would you like to charter a ship?
textByHashes.40c4b993619e7546ce94b485fcabce4dc7f85f16: With all due credit, Trader Stan is a great employer, but he insists we wear the latest in high fashion even when sailing.
textByHashes.cd5d1dfe0ce7669bd5454e0b695e2a4626924994: Do you have even the slightest idea how tricky it is to sail in this stuff?
textByHashes.0418548c79b4dc2e16acc210084c073842d3ced8: Some of us tried tearing it and arguing that it was too fragile to wear when on a boat, but he just had it enchanted to re-stitch itself.
textByHashes.e36cebd1eda2a7f7adf212d43b11f61e1c1338f6: It's hard to hate him when we know how much he shells out on this gear, but if I fall overboard because of this getup one more time, I'm going to quit.
textByHashes.8867fe96372ac8c9951ee86ed7517e91e53a269d: Anyway, would you like to take a look at our exotic wares from around the world? Or would you like to charter a ship?
textByHashes.9581a8c50285aabb024da9f3a7c9dbd80dad9c33: Certainly sir. Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.aa5cb08a08b65a323d3446dffba4c40eff82dcc5: Certainly madam. Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.4f5eb90cd56454bf99cd3bc9230631cd4c98692e: No charter ship would take you to that island. You'd need to buy your own ship and, even then, you'd have trouble finding a captain crazy enough to go there.
textByHashes.25bb0f86d18e105aa75fe07a7f5b46220b7f4069: Sorry, we aren't a laundry ship. You'll need to leave those dirty bedsheets behind.
textByHashes.5525b365f7a8c23ac340e030ecf8a4cd00e77339: No, then we would just mock you.
textByHashes.41e5aedd3fa95e50e99442b8098384f94621ae13: Is that your bedsheet covered in filthy slime?
textByHashes.3f01394911b2e3f3cc9446e12605ab497c985c95: Well, whoever it belongs to, it's not coming on this ship!
textByHashes.bb3b4805e4626c5362602b2350174366e3b08068: The same thing that brings us everywhere, friend. We're here to trade. The tortugans were reluctant at first, but we eventually convinced them to let us do business with them.
textByHashes.6f57f893ce924bfa87873777d63f2169ba2256b1: It's a shame they won't let us actually go beyond the docks though. I'd quite like to see the rest of their island...
textByHashes.5f4b1b5810c1e2a04da8521887bd6ebc7eae758f: Why do you want to travel to a port you are already at? Do you want to travel somewhere else?
